{"activeBranchId":0,"chainList":[{"description":"共鸣解放终末回环展开的星域获得加强：
·治疗和增益效果生效范围增加150%。
·持续时间增加10秒。
·施放变奏技能洞悉后不再结束星域。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1727419281032.png","name":"不语者假想","order":1,"unlocked":true},{"description":"浅析星域新增额外效果：附近队伍中的角色攻击提升40%。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1727419683445.png","name":"夜幕的赠予与拒绝","order":2,"unlocked":true},{"description":"施放共鸣解放终末回环时，守岸人额外回复20点协奏能量，每25秒可触发1次。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1727419358907.png","name":"无限正将我等待","order":3,"unlocked":true},{"description":"施放共鸣技能混沌理论时，治疗效果加成提升70%。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1727419824378.png","name":"万物寂静满溢","order":4,"unlocked":true},{"description":"普攻第三段牵引范围增加50%，共鸣回路演绎牵引范围增加30%。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1727419784081.png","name":"来自缄默的回声","order":5,"unlocked":true},{"description":"变奏技能洞悉伤害倍率提升42%。施放变奏技能洞悉时，守岸人的暴击伤害提升500%。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1727419775704.png","name":"我所驶向的新世界","order":6,"unlocked":true}],"equipPhantomAddPropList":[{"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"21380","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625484466.png"},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"405","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625429754.png"},{"attributeName":"防御","attributeValue":"431","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625832584.png"},{"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"105%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625791807.png"},{"attributeName":"共鸣效率","attributeValue":"62%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625923096.png"},{"attributeName":"共鸣解放伤害加成","attributeValue":"58%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625855579.png"},{"attributeName":"治疗效果加成","attributeValue":"36. 长按声骸技能，可在震击结束后，消耗耐力持续进行攻击，每次造成基于生命上限1.58%的衍射伤害；结束长按时，触发最后一击，造成基于生命上限19.82%的衍射伤害。
技能冷却：20秒"},"quality":5,"subProps":[{"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"10010-2","valid":true},{"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"580","key":"17-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"共鸣效率","attributeValue":"12.4%","key":"11-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"21%","key":"9-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"共鸣解放伤害加成","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"18-1","valid":true}]},{"cost":3,"fetterDetail":{"firstDescription":"治疗效果提升10%","groupId":7,"iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/88/element_group_pic/1735783150223.png","name":"隐世回光","num":5,"secondDescription":"自身为友方提供治疗时，全队共鸣者攻击力提升15%，持续30秒","tripleDescription":"","type":0},"level":25,"mainProps":[{"attributeName":"共鸣效率","attributeValue":"32.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/66/phantom_attribute_icon_two/1766625324631.png","key":"11-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"100","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/66/phantom_attribute_icon_two/1766626168865.png","key":"10007-1","valid":true}],"phantomProp":{"cost":3,"iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/30/phantom_icon/1716031646101.png","name":"磐石守卫","phantomId":390077024,"phantomPropId":60000245,"quality":5,"skillDescription":"使用声骸技能，幻形为磐石守卫。可在一段时间内进行防御，受到攻击后会对敌人直接造成一次基于自身生命上限8.29%的衍射伤害，并进行一次追击造成生命上限8.29%的衍射伤害。
 幻形期间可以再次使用声骸技能退出幻形。
 若受到的为特殊技攻击，则会击破敌人的特殊技，并进行两段追击，每段造成基于自身生命上限5.52%的衍射伤害，同时发射三道地裂波，每道造成生命上限4.59%衍射伤害。
  技能冷却：15秒"},"quality":5,"subProps":[{"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"10010-2","valid":true},{"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"580","key":"17-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"共鸣效率","attributeValue":"12.4%","key":"11-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"21%","key":"9-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"共鸣解放伤害加成","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"18-1","valid":true}]},{"cost":3,"fetterDetail":{"firstDescription":"治疗效果提升10%","groupId":7,"iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/88/element_group_pic/1735783150223.png","name":"隐世回光","num":5,"secondDescription":"自身为友方提供治疗时，全队共鸣者攻击力提升15%，持续30秒","tripleDescription":"","type":0},"level":25,"mainProps":[{"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"30.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/66/phantom_attribute_icon_two/1766625602025.png","key":"10002-2","valid":true},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"100","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/66/phantom_attribute_icon_two/1766626168865.png","key":"10007-1","valid":true}],"phantomProp":{"cost":3,"iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/30/phantom_icon/1716032170027.png","name":"冥渊守卫","phantomId":390077025,"phantomPropId":60000215,"quality":5,"skillDescription":"使用声骸技能，幻形为冥渊守卫施放跃击。命中时造成273.60%湮灭伤害，命中敌人后扣除自身10.00%的生命值，5秒后周期性回复自身生命值，共回复生命上限10.00%的生命值。
 技能冷却：15秒"},"quality":5,"subProps":[{"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"10010-2","valid":true},{"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"580","key":"17-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"共鸣效率","attributeValue":"12.4%","key":"11-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"21%","key":"9-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"共鸣解放伤害加成","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"18-1","valid":true}]},{"cost":1,"fetterDetail":{"firstDescription":"治疗效果提升10%","groupId":7,"iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/88/element_group_pic/1735783150223.png","name":"隐世回光","num":5,"secondDescription":"自身为友方提供治疗时，全队共鸣者攻击力提升15%，持续30秒","tripleDescription":"","type":0},"level":25,"mainProps":[{"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"22.8%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/66/phantom_attribute_icon_two/1766625602025.png","key":"10002-2","valid":true},{"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"2280","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/66/phantom_attribute_icon_two/1766625604410.png","key":"10002-1","valid":true}],"phantomProp":{"cost":1,"iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/30/phantom_icon/1716031747170.png","name":"火鬃狼","phantomId":390070100,"phantomPropId":60000365,"quality":5,"skillDescription":"使用声骸技能，召唤火鬃狼撕咬敌人，造成32.00%+64热熔伤害。
 技能冷却：8秒"},"quality":5,"subProps":[{"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"10010-2","valid":true},{"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"580","key":"17-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"共鸣效率","attributeValue":"12.4%","key":"11-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"21%","key":"9-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"共鸣解放伤害加成","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"18-1","valid":true}]},{"cost":1,"fetterDetail":{"firstDescription":"治疗效果提升10%","groupId":7,"iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/88/element_group_pic/1735783150223.png","name":"隐世回光","num":5,"secondDescription":"自身为友方提供治疗时，全队共鸣者攻击力提升15%，持续30秒","tripleDescription":"","type":0},"level":25,"mainProps":[{"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"22.8%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/66/phantom_attribute_icon_two/1766625602025.png","key":"10002-2","valid":true},{"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"2280","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/66/phantom_attribute_icon_two/1766625604410.png","key":"10002-1","valid":true}],"phantomProp":{"cost":1,"iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/30/phantom_icon/1716031396447.png","name":"呜咔咔","phantomId":390070069,"phantomPropId":60000095,"quality":5,"skillDescription":"使用声骸技能，召唤呜咔咔向敌人冲撞撕咬，冲撞时命中的敌人将受到68.48%湮灭伤害，被撕咬命中的敌人将受到102.72%湮灭伤害，并持续削减共振度，在5秒内共削减5.00%。
 技能冷却：15秒"},"quality":5,"subProps":[{"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"10010-2","valid":true},{"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"580","key":"17-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"共鸣效率","attributeValue":"12.4%","key":"11-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"21%","key":"9-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"共鸣解放伤害加成","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"18-1","valid":true}]}]},"role":{"acronym":"sar","attributeId":5,"attributeName":"衍射","breach":6,"chainUnlockNum":0,"isMainRole":true,"level":90,"roleIconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/27/role_icon/1727419309663.png","roleId":1505,"roleName":"守岸人","rolePicUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/27/role_pic/1766623389265.png","starLevel":5,"weaponTypeId":5,"weaponTypeName":"音感仪"},"roleAttributeList":[{"attributeId":2,"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"47168","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625484466.png","sort":1000},{"attributeId":7,"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"1049","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625429754.png","sort":2000},{"attributeId":10,"attributeName":"防御","attributeValue":"1099","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625832584.png","sort":3000},{"attributeId":8,"attributeName":"暴击","attributeValue":"5%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625901965.png","sort":5000},{"attributeId":9,"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"255%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625791807.png","sort":6000},{"attributeId":11,"attributeName":"共鸣效率","attributeValue":"271%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625923096.png","sort":7000},{"attributeId":141,"attributeName":"偏谐值累积效率","attributeValue":"100.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625821120.png","sort":7500},{"attributeId":19,"attributeName":"共鸣解放伤害加成","attributeValue":"58%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625855579.png","sort":11000},{"attributeId":35,"attributeName":"治疗效果加成","attributeValue":"48.4%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625436697.png","sort":27000}],"roleSkin":{"isAddition":true,"picUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/90/skin_pic/1766623476031.png","priority":1,"quality":3,"qualityName":"初始服饰","skinIcon":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/90/skin_icon/1735782687352.png","skinId":81001505,"skinName":"如始亦终"},"skillList":[{"activeBranch":true,"level":10,"skill":{"description":"普攻
进行最多4段的连续攻击，造成衍射伤害。攻击命中目标时生成坍缩核。

重击
长按普攻持续消耗耐力，进入解限状态，在该状态下：
·每1秒积蓄1段演算数据。
·可以自动采集一定范围内的植物类采集物。
·耐力不足或通过点按普攻等方式结束解限状态时，对目标造成衍射伤害，同时已积累的每1段演算数据转化为1段【实论数据】并生成1枚坍缩核。

空中攻击
消耗耐力进行空中下落攻击。攻击命中目标时生成1枚坍缩核。一定时间内短按普攻将会施放普攻第2段。

闪避反击
成功闪避后一定时间内短按普攻，将会攻击目标，造成衍射伤害。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/36/role_skill_icon/1727419424791.png","id":385,"name":"真源构演","skillBranches":[],"type":"常态攻击"}},{"activeBranch":true,"level":10,"skill":{"description":"回复附近队伍中所有角色的生命值，并召唤5只黯星·蝶。黯星·蝶将自动追踪目标，造成衍射伤害。一定时间内短按普攻将会施放普攻第2段。
可在空中施放。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/36/role_skill_icon/1727419449870.png","id":386,"name":"混沌理论","skillBranches":[],"type":"共鸣技能"}},{"activeBranch":true,"level":10,"skill":{"description":"浅析星域
展开浅析星域，持续为处于星域生效范围内的附近队伍中登场角色回复生命值，每3秒可触发1次。

深潜星域
浅析星域持续期间，当附近队伍中的角色使用变奏技能时，将进入深潜星域。深潜星域生效范围内附近队伍中所有角色暴击提升：守岸人自身每0.2%共鸣效率计算为0.01%暴击提升，上限12.5%。
深潜星域继承浅析星域的所有效果。

解限星域
深潜星域持续期间，当附近队伍中的角色使用变奏技能时，将进入解限星域。解限星域生效范围内附近队伍中所有角色暴击伤害提升：守岸人自身每0.1%共鸣效率计算为0.01%暴击伤害提升，上限25%。
解限星域继承浅析星域和深潜星域的所有效果。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/36/role_skill_icon/1727419807157.png","id":387,"name":"终末回环","skillBranches":[],"type":"共鸣解放"}},{"activeBranch":true,"level":10,"skill":{"description":"启迪
守岸人出现，回复附近队伍中所有角色的生命值，并召唤5只黯星·蝶。黯星·蝶将自动追踪目标，造成衍射伤害，此次伤害为共鸣技能伤害。

洞悉
解限星域持续期间，守岸人的变奏技能启迪替换为变奏技能洞悉。施放时对应星域状态结束，回复附近队伍中所有角色的生命值，并攻击目标造成衍射伤害。此次伤害为共鸣解放伤害，并且必定暴击。同一个解限星域中仅可触发1次变奏技能洞悉。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/36/role_skill_icon/1727419296210.png","id":390,"name":"故此证明","skillBranches":[],"type":"变奏技能"}},{"activeBranch":true,"level":10,"skill":{"description":"耀星·蝶
常态攻击命中目标时，生成坍缩核悬浮在空中，并在6秒后演化为耀星·蝶。耀星·蝶将自动追踪目标，造成衍射伤害。若场上坍缩核的数量已达到5枚，守岸人下一次普攻会催生坍缩核，使之提前演化为耀星·蝶。

演绎
持有5段【实论数据】时，施放重击将消耗所有【实论数据】，牵引周围的目标，造成衍射伤害，并使所有坍缩核立即演化为耀星·蝶。

衍变
持有5段【实论数据】时，施放空中攻击将消耗所有【实论数据】，造成衍射伤害，并使所有坍缩核立即演化为耀星·蝶。一定时间内短按普攻将会施放普攻第2段。

实论数据获取规则
【实论数据】上限5段。
普攻第1段、普攻第2段、普攻第4段命中目标时，获得1段【实论数据】。
普攻第3段命中目标时，获得2段【实论数据】。
空中攻击命中目标时，获得1段【实论数据】。
